patches.summary: Accept SE_RANKING_API_KEY as an alias for the generated SE_RANKING_API_KEY_QUERY environment variable.
patches.reason: SE Ranking's official docs talk about an API key/apikey query parameter; the alias is easier and safer for agents to remember while preserving generator compatibility.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./... passes; doctor uses env:SE_RANKING_API_KEY when the alias is set.
